name: KrillApp.MQTT
title: MQTT
description: Publishes to or subscribes from an MQTT broker. In publish mode, reads the source DataPoint's snapshot value, converts it to an ON/OFF JSON payload, and publishes to the configured broker topic. In subscribe mode, listens for messages on the topic. Supports integration with Zigbee MQTT and other IoT messaging systems.
shortDescription: Publishes data to or subscribes from an MQTT broker topic.
llmPurpose: Publishes DataPoint values to or subscribes from an MQTT broker topic for IoT device communication.
llmBehavior: connects to MQTT broker at configured address
publishes source DataPoint value as ON/OFF JSON payload (PUB mode)
subscribes to topic and receives messages (SUB mode)
reads from source nodes and can write to target nodes
llmTypicalUseCases: integrate with Home Assistant or other MQTT systems
llmCreationHints: Create an MQTT node when the user wants to communicate with an MQTT broker. Configure the broker address, topic, and action mode (PUB or SUB). For publishing, connect a source DataPoint.

llmConnectionHints.role: action node that communicates with external MQTT broker

llmExamples: Publish this sensor value to the MQTT broker.
Subscribe to the Zigbee temperature topic.
Send ON/OFF commands to this IoT device via MQTT.
Connect to the MQTT broker at 192.168.1.5.
